name: German Sweet Chocolate Snack Cake/Frosting
recipeIngredient: 1 package (4 oz) Bakers German Sweet Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
CAKE: Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large microwavable bowl, melt chocolate and margarine on HIGH for 2 minutes, stirring until completely melted. Add sugar and stir until well blended. Beat in eggs one at a time with an electric mixer until thoroughly mixed. Stir in vanilla extract. Alternately add half of the flour mixture and buttermilk to the chocolate mixture, mixing until smooth. Pour batter into a greased 13 x 9 inch pan. Bake for 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Allow to cool in the pan on a wire rack.
FROSTING: In a saucepan, combine milk, sugar, margarine, egg yolks, and vanilla extract. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens for about 6 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in coconut and pecans. Allow to cool slightly before spreading on the cooled snack cake.
Makes approximately 2 cups or enough frosting for one 13 x 9 inch cake.
Prep Time: 20 minutes Baking time: 50 minutes
